## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is improving, but there's a need to broaden content scope to target higher-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Content strategy will shift to focus more on technical data analysts rather than business analysts](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [New topics will emphasize advanced analytics and practical applications like embedded analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Communication and reporting processes will be streamlined for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Content Strategy

  - [Current articles ranking well, but mostly for low-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Need to expand scope to target broader, higher-volume searches](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Balance between product-specific content and general industry topics](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on fundamentals and one-on-one articles to funnel readers to more specific content](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Target Audience Refinement

  - [Shift focus from business analysts to more technical data analysts](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Prioritize topics relevant to data infrastructure and practical applications](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Emphasize connection between analytics and underlying data pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

### Content Priorities

  - [Advanced analytics and embedded analytics identified as high-priority topics](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Databricks SQL and Spark SQL content to be developed further](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Reduce focus on basic business analyst topics (e.g., data visualization, hypothesis testing)](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

### Long-form Content Initiative

  - [Plan to convert existing thought leadership blog into an e-book](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Team to provide detailed brief and chapter outlines for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

### Communication and Reporting

  - [Streamline weekly updates to reduce noise for broader team](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
  - [Share performance reports before meetings for more productive discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Maintain open communication channels for strategy points and brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review 3 articles in client review and 3 in stage 5/6 before the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Develop and share topics/titles for advanced analytics and embedded analytics content](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Create detailed brief for long-form content (e-book) project](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [Implement streamlined communication process for weekly updates](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2299.0)
  - [Maintain weekly sync calls, even during Vivek's absence next week](https://fathom.video/share/ex5ZUAXtwXe6zmyyRwVxKLX6cn8hUQqh?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
